source: v2 — replaces the fixed P1/P2/P3 preset model with a compositional model: always-on fixed infrastructure + free-text theme + free-text venue. See docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-23-ev-scene-generator-v2-design.md.
global_rules_text:
CRITICAL — EV IDENTITY PRESERVATION: IMAGE A shows the SNACKET NitroCafé EV already branded for {{companyName}}. Reproduce this exact vehicle with 100% structural fidelity: same shape, proportions, color, wheels, driver cab, body panels, raised open gull-wing doors, three chrome faucets, metal tray, coffee machine, QR panel and all hardware. Do NOT generate a different vehicle. Do NOT alter, add, move or remove any logo or branding already present on the EV in IMAGE A — the EV branding is final.
CRITICAL — NOT A FOOD TRUCK: the SNACKET EV is an electric vehicle with its own internal brand-activation infrastructure — it has no interior service counter or walk-up service capacity like a food truck. The EV Operator and Brand Ambassador are NEVER positioned inside the vehicle, inside the service opening, or behind a service counter — both always stand on the ground, outside and in front of the EV. This is a real product fact, not a style choice, and applies regardless of venue or theme.
CRITICAL — NO LABEL TEXT: "IMAGE A" and "IMAGE B" are internal reference labels for this prompt only. NEVER render the literal words "IMAGE A" or "IMAGE B" as text anywhere in the output — not on the backdrop, not on signage, not anywhere. Wherever the client logo is displayed (backdrop, balloons, cups, flyers, LED posters), render the actual logo artwork graphic, never the words describing it.
template:
SNACKET NitroCafé EV brand activation scene for {{companyName}}.

IMAGE A = the branded {{companyName}} EV (final, do not modify). IMAGE B = the {{companyName}} logo, used ONLY as color/artwork reference for balloons, backdrop, LED posters, cups and printed materials.

{{GLOBAL_RULES}}

VENUE: {{venue}}.

THEME: {{theme}}.

EV UNIT: reproduce IMAGE A exactly — same camera angle (rear 3/4 view, slightly elevated), same open gull-wing doors, same branding.

TEAM:
- EV OPERATOR ({{operator_gender}}): wearing {{uniform}}. Standing on the ground, outside and in front of the EV, with event guests visible nearby in the scene. Pose and specific interaction with guests are unconstrained — any natural pose the model chooses is acceptable.
{{brand_ambassador_block}}

{{FIXED_INFRASTRUCTURE}}

CROWD: additional attendees dispersed naturally around the venue — chatting, walking, engaging with the activation and with each other.

COMPOSITION: the EV and its fixed infrastructure (LED posters, balloon arch, bar tables, step-and-repeat, EV-front carpet) anchor the primary frame, positioned naturally within the described venue.

PHOTOGRAPHY: {{photo_style}}, 8K, photorealistic depth of field, f/5.6, 35mm lens.

{{notes_block}}

uniform.brand_casual: brand casual: fitted branded polo shirt, clean chinos, white sneakers
uniform.formal_chic: formal chic: tailored blazer, dress shirt or blouse, slim trousers or pencil skirt, dress shoes
uniform.sporty: sporty: performance zip-up jacket, jogger pants, athletic sneakers
uniform.all_black: all-black slim uniform: fitted black turtleneck, tailored black trousers, black leather sneakers

brand_ambassador.female: - BRAND AMBASSADOR (female, elegant woman, late 20s): wearing {{uniform}}. Standing on the ground, outside and in front of the EV, with event guests visible nearby in the scene.
brand_ambassador.male: - BRAND AMBASSADOR (male, charismatic man, late 20s): wearing {{uniform}}. Standing on the ground, outside and in front of the EV, with event guests visible nearby in the scene.

operator_gender.both: male and female (two operators, both outside and in front of the EV, both with guests visible nearby)

photo_style.editorial_lifestyle: editorial lifestyle photography, warm moody tones
photo_style.drone_aerial: drone aerial perspective, bird's eye view
photo_style.highend_event: high-end event photography, sharp foreground, cinematic bokeh background
